valueSection.title: QA that proves its value
valueSection.subtitle: Design at Echocode is not just about visuals, it's about hypotheses that turn into revenue. We are looking for a designer with a strong analytical approach who can defend their decisions based on data and user experience.

descriptionSections.title: What will you be working on?

values.title: End-to-end Quality:
values.desc: Full cycle testing of complex mobile and web products.

values.title: Process Ownership:
values.desc: Building and optimizing QA processes within product squads.

values.title: Data-Driven QA:
values.desc: Working with stability metrics and analyzing root causes of production defects.

values.title: Automation Advocacy:
values.desc: Opportunity to implement automated tests to speed up CI/CD.

values.title: Cross-Platform Testing Experience
values.desc: 2+ years of experience in Mobile (iOS/Android) and Web testing.

values.title: Client–Server ＆ API Knowledge
values.desc: Deep understanding of client-server architecture and API interaction (Postman/Charles).

values.title: Crash ＆ Analytics Tools
values.desc: Experience with Crashlytics, Firebase, and analytics tools.

values.title: SDLC ＆ Agile Process Understanding
values.desc: Understanding of SDLC and Agile methodologies.

values.title: Detail-Oriented ＆ Analytical
values.desc: Attention to detail and critical thinking.

values.title: Clear Communication ＆ Problem Solving
values.desc: Ability to clearly communicate problems and propose solutions.

values.title: Fintech ／ High-Load Product Experience
values.desc: Experience in Fintech or high-load products.

selectionSection.title: Step 01
selectionSection.subTitle: Screening call
selectionSection.desc: We assess your SDLC knowledge, prioritization, and ability to identify product vulnerabilities.

selectionSection.title: Step 03
selectionSection.subTitle: Tech Interview
selectionSection.desc: Deep dive into testing methodologies, toolsets, and Agile integration experience.

selectionSection.title: Step 04
selectionSection.subTitle: Offer
selectionSection.desc: Clear partnership proposal focused on your growth and impact on product quality.
